problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: Combining mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 22 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
